creator: nacho319+freebsdZilla@gmail.com
text:
There is a single download for libp0f that includes more updated signatures available from CERT.

available as:

http://tools.netsa.cert.org/releases/libp0f-2.0.8-2012032901.tar.gz
http://tools.netsa.cert.org/releases/libp0f-2.0.8-2012032901.tar.bz2
http://tools.netsa.cert.org/releases/libp0f-2.0.8-2012032901.tar.xz


which is libp0f-2.0.8, what's currently available, with passive signature set 2012032901.  Those are much more updated signatures.  More updated signatures should come in a few months, upgrading the 2012032901 number.
